title: A petavoxel fragment of human cerebral cortex reconstructed at nanoscale resolution
abstract: A 1.4 petabyte EM dataset of a 1mm3 sample of human temporal cortex was imaged at 4nm resolution, revealing tens of thousands of neurons, 130 million synapses, and unusual structures including axonal whorls and multi-synaptic connections not previously described.
notes: Already in existing 102. Landmark human cortex EM dataset.
